calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sheldon Lodmer, Esq. (310-552-1670; sheldon@lodmerlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
James Daire, Esq. (415-699-6744; jdaire@yelp.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT YELP, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. The Court declines to consider the extrinsic evidence attached to the Makhija declaration, which is not properly before the Court on demurrer.

[see word minutes for details.]

Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT YELP, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Continued to July 14, 2021. Plaintiff failed to file its opposition. Plaintiff is to file its opposition nine court days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
